title: lib/reduce - Hadoop MapReduce Architecture
description: The lib/reduce directory is responsible for providing a high-level, architectural abstraction for the Hadoop MapReduce framework. It collaborates with other components to enable the execution of reduce tasks in a distributed environment. The directory follows the pattern of the MapReduce architecture, providing a centralized location for reduce-related functionality and ensuring modularity and extensibility.

raw_response:
TITLE: lib/reduce - Hadoop MapReduce Architecture

DESCRIPTION:
The lib/reduce directory is responsible for providing a high-level, architectural abstraction for the Hadoop MapReduce framework. It collaborates with other components to enable the execution of reduce tasks in a distributed environment. The directory follows the pattern of the MapReduce architecture, providing a centralized location for reduce-related functionality and ensuring modularity and extensibility.
